# Test data

Real-world fixtures used by the readers, with their provenance and licenses.

## pymarc-sample.mrc

20 MARC 21 bibliographic records in binary ISO 2709 (MARC-8 encoding) — real
catalog records, used to exercise the readers and the cross-format conversion
matrix against authentic data rather than only hand-built records.

- **Source:** the [pymarc](https://gitlab.com/pymarc/pymarc) project's
  `test/marc.dat` (the records are factual bibliographic metadata).
- **License:** pymarc is distributed under the BSD 2-Clause license, reproduced
  below.
